title: Your First React Application
subtitle: Modern JavaScript, TypeScript foundations, and the React mental model
mission: Build your first React application and understand how React works.
expectedOutcome: Create a React project with Vite and TypeScript
Create reusable functional components with clear props
Explain JSX and how it differs from HTML
Explain why React exists and what problem it solves
Structure a small project with separated components
Debug common Day 1 mistakes: JSX syntax, missing return, wrong imports
definitionOfDone: Landing page project is complete with Hero, Navbar, Features, and Footer
Layout is responsive on mobile and desktop
Components are separated into their own files
Quiz is completed with passing score
Interview questions are answered in writing or out loud

tomorrowPreview.title: Professional Login Page
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will manage component state with useState, handle forms as controlled inputs, and build a production-style login page with validation, loading, and error states.
